repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure_v1: sharp ADE bounds from shared local-network completions, no statistical inference/asymptotic covariance/estimator-equivalence claim

published_prior_art.cite: Leung2022ANI, Leung2023NCRI, BasseDingFellerToulis2024, GaoDing2025Network, PuelzBasseFellerToulis2022, WeinsteinNevo2026: no joint iff cone frontier for ANI point scores, NCR/HAC covariance, and design-orbit randomization

BasseDingFellerToulis2024 + PuelzBasseFellerToulis2022 + WeinsteinNevo2026 + Savje2024MisspecifiedExposure: closest papers cover validity/bias/estimability, not open-set three-procedure separation above an observable frontier

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add one explicit finite example where Delta_eta=0 but mu_perp>0 or vice versa is impossible, to make the observable-frontier versus realized-tail distinction mechanically checkable.
State the optimization class of Delta_eta as a named SOCP or conic program with dimensions and constraints counted in m_n and q_n.
For Conjecture 2, name the exact procedure-object pair that separates in each boundary example: ANI vs RT point law, HAC vs NCR covariance, or HAC vs RT covariance.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 derivation, prioritizing the finite cone algebra for Conjecture 1 and a nondegenerate open-set witness for Conjecture 2.
